programme.title: Any Given Day: Cork University Hospital
programme.desc: Sean G has severe chest pain and is rushed to CUH Emergency Department by his family. (SL,HD)

programme.title: Duffy's Pub
programme.desc: US actor Patrick Duffy, a third-generation Irishman, tours the country to explore the sense of community created by pubs, while also noting the changes they have undergone. (SL,HD)

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: In Harmonstown, Dublin 5, Dermot tackles a former Corporation house. Homeowners Eimear and Adam, who are juggling work, kids and a serious lack of space. (SL,HD)

programme.title: High Road, Low Road
programme.desc: In Nantes, France, friends and actors Charlene McKenna and Kathy Kiera Clarke enjoy a boat trip and ride a steampunk elephant around town. (SL,HD)

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: In the series finale, Maggie and Kieran travel to Mayo to meet hairdresser Patrice Lyttle who is desperate to get on the property ladder, close to where she works in Westport. (SL,HD)

programme.title: Home Rescue: The Big Fix
programme.desc: In the final episode of the season, the Home Rescue team helps a mother and son living in a cluttered apartment in Scholarstown to make the most of their space. (SL,HD)

programme.title: Le Chéile
programme.desc: The story of East Belfast GAA during its first full year of play, revealing how it began with a tweet in 2020 inviting people from all backgrounds, beliefs and abilities to join. (SL,HD)

programme.title: Na Singalings
programme.desc: Is iomaí píosa spraoi a bhíonn ag páirc aonaigh. (There are lots of fun things to do at a fairground.)

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Téann Dora agus Bróigín go Cnoc na mBananaí chun cuairt a thabhairt ar Isa. (Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to visit Isa.)

programme.title: Abby's Amazing Adventure
programme.desc: Tugann Ciseán Abby agus Rudy chuig páirc shiamsaíochta inniu. (Basket brings Abby and Rudy to an amusement park today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Tá Posy ag iarraidh go ndéanfadh sí féin agus Pip portráidí dá chéile sna pancóga. (Pip and Posy are decorating pancakes & Posy suggests they create pancake portraits.)

programme.title: PJ Masks

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Tagann Wussywat ar uirlisí ceoil ach níl sí in ann iad a sheinm. (Wussywat finds some musical instruments but can't play them properly.)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Is é Breithlá Bhean Zolli é agus tá Zou agus Elzee ag iarraidh bronntanas iontach a fháil di. (It's Mrs Zolli's birthday so Zou and Elzee go in search of a present for her.)

programme.title: Dinocity

programme.title: Dot

programme.title: Baile Beag Draíochtúil Pinocchio
programme.desc: Nuair a thugann Leipreachán cuairt ar an mBaile Draíochta tarraingíonn sé trioblóid aisteach. (A Leprechaun comes to the Village and creates nightmares for everyone.)

programme.title: Angelo Rules

programme.title: Dónall Dána

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha

programme.title: Pip & Posy

programme.title: Saol Faoi Shráid
